title: Ginger Ray Gold Script Large Donut Wall Party Wedding Decoration - Gold Wedding
features: Gold foiled large Donut Wall - Perfect to wow your guests!
Lean against a wall for stability
description: From the manufacturer Large Gold Foiled Donut Wall Amaze your guests with this large gold foiled donut wall. A super cute idea for your perfect day. Make your very own unique wedding sweet table that will be adored by your family, friends and little ones. A finishing touch to an unforgettable day. A great wedding cake alternative or a fun way to give your desert table the wow factor. Take a look at our gold wedding range to find more gold wedding decorations and continue the theme! Each pack contains 1 wall with stand. Each wall measures 84cm (H), 64cm (W). The pack contains 42 wooden pegs to hang 42 donuts. The donut wall must lean against a wall to ensure 100% stability for your donuts!
